⚡ BCL Hub
← Back to Dashboard
📤 Upload & Build Dashboard
Upload your monthly source data and rebuild the live dashboard in one click.
1
Download Templates
Get the Excel templates with correct column structure
2
Fill & Upload
Paste your data into templates and upload each file
3
Build Dashboard
Click Build — dashboard updates live in ~2 minutes
📥 Step 1 — Download Templates
Download each template, paste your data in from Row 3 onwards (Row 1 = headers, Row 2 = example). Do NOT change column names.
📤 Step 2 — Select Report Period & Upload Files
Set the period (month/year) then upload your filled template files. Required files are marked with ⚠️.
e.g. 2026-04 for April 2026
🔨 Step 3 — Build Dashboard
All required files uploaded? Click Build to process data, calculate P&L for all territories, and update the live dashboard.
⚙️ Building Dashboard...
